The '''Mere Resistance''' was a small resistance movement led by former [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Sol Sixxa]], in opposition to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] operations in the [[Karthakk system]]. They fought at many battles including the [[Battle of Nod Kartha|Nod Kartha]], the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], and the [[Battle of Lok (22 BBY)|Second Battle of Lok]]. They often worked alongside [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]].

{{Stub}}
